parameters.content:
## Action

### Cleans the fetched email, parses the agendas, and outputs it in a list-format.

## Trigger

### Fetches calendar invites that are either created or updated

## Action

### Checks the calendar if the triggered event is the most recent event. If true, merges the email body and sends the email reminder; If not, ends the workflow.

json.subject: Meeting Reminder – [Playbook Update] Matthew McDonnell - EVA
json.html:
Meeting Reminder

Scheduled for Thursday, November 20, 2025 at 1:00 PM CST

Good day!

Hope you're doing well! Just a quick reminder about our meeting, Thursday, November 20, 2025 at 1:00 PM CST. We'll use this time to connect, walk through your questions, and align on next steps. To help things go smoothly, it would be great if:

  • You can join from a quiet, comfy spot so we can hear each other clearly.
  • In case you’ll be sharing your screen, kindly give it a quick test beforehand.

Agenda

  • Current State discussion
  • New Workflows
  • Timelines

Here's the link for your convenience: https://scalevirtually.zoom.us/my/ajamojica

Join the Meeting

We look forward to speaking with you later!

We'll use this time to connect, walk through your questions, and align on next steps.
